---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's the workflow you're trying to support?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? If it changes the `.ivk` format or scripting API, show an example.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches could work? Why is your proposal better?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar features in other tools (Bruno, Postman, Insomnia, etc.).
